hooks.prompt:
You are a test analysis agent. A source file was just edited.

Search the entire project for any approval test output:
  find . -name '*.received.txt'

If no received file exists, return { "ok": true } — no approval test ran for this edit.

For each received file found, locate the corresponding approved file (same path and base name, with .approved.txt instead of .received.txt) and compare them.

1. If all received files are identical to their approved counterparts, return { "ok": true }
2. If any differ, return { "ok": false, "reason": "<your diagnosis>" }

In the reason explain what changed in terms of observable behavior — not just which lines differ, but what the system now does differently.
